parts.text: Use only provenance session tools: session_lookup, session_detail with detail='messages', and message_detail. Do not use glob, grep, read, bash, transcript files, or any other tools. Determine why src/cache/ttl.ts caps requested TTL with namespaceMaxSeconds on line 2. I’ll look up the prior TTL rationale session and inspect only its message metadata/content enough to identify the supporting message.

parts.text:

- `blob_id`: `cache_ttl`
